calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

HEARING ON DEFENDANTS ADORE HOMES, INC., KEN BALTERISKI, ANH NGUYEN, MARY ROSE ANN AND TOM GINSBERG'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Plaintiff Queen Adu-Poku, in pro per.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS ADORE HOMES, INC., KEN BALTERISKI, ANH NGUYEN, MARY ROSE ANN AND TOM GINSBERG'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Matter discussed. The Court notes the Plaintiff did not contest the tentative ruling in a timely fashion. Upon conclusion, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting defendants' motion to compel arbitration (see signed order for complete ruling.)*****
